utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 top-level items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes all five sections. Verify each for full specification with costs:
- health_coverage: includes physical_health with named plan, policy number, and €130/month; mental_health included under the same plan (implicitly covered, cost tied to PrimeCare plan); emergency_medical with separate policy and €32.50/month. Costs are present. This meets 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'.
- property_coverage: home_insurance with plan, policy number, €58.50/month; contents_insurance with plan, policy number, €29.25/month. Costs present. Meets 'home/contents insurance with costs'.
- travel_coverage: international_travel with plan, policy number, €74.75/month. Costs present. Meets 'travel insurance with costs'.
- additional_services: premium_membership, claims_advocacy, account_management; each indicates included/complimentary with value; costs (complimentary) are specified. Meets 'any enhancement services with costs'.
- total_budget: monthly_cost €325.00, annual_cost €3,900, plus savings and discount details and first billing date. Provides complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. All items are included and fully specified with the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item in the final coverage plan to the exact names in the ground-truth ratings. Dedicated Executive Account Manager has no rating, so omit.
